name: max_distance.max_distance_km = 10
description: Increase the max-distance hard rule from 5 km to 10 km for counterfactual allocation checks.

name: weights: fairness_score prioritized
description: Shift scoring weights so fairness_score becomes the dominant factor in the replayed run.

name: min_rating disabled
description: Disable the min_rating hard rule and compare the resulting partner selections.

name: partner_pool.remove busiest_partner
description: Remove the busiest partner from the candidate pool before rerunning the stored allocation.

name: Enable Traffic-Aware Proximity
description: Penalize high-traffic routes so nearby partners stuck in jam conditions can rank below slightly farther partners on clearer roads.
